options.name: --tranche
options.description: Specify tranche to override

options.name: --group
options.description: Consumer Group

options.name: --overrideposition
options.description: (optional) Override to specified position

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for a Cosmos account.
(optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified)

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for Cosmos store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE
specified)

options.name: --container
options.description:
specify a container name for Cosmos store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONTAINER
specified)

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retrieswaittime
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds (default: 5)

options.name: --leasecontainer
options.description:
Specify full Lease Container Name (default: Container
+ Suffix).

options.name: --suffix
options.description:
Specify Container Name suffix (default: `-aux`, if
LeaseContainer not specified).

options.name: --lagfreqm
options.description: Specify frequency to dump lag stats. Default: off

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --regionprofile
options.description:
specify an AWS Region (aka System Name, e.g.
"us-east-1") to connect to using the implicit AWS
SDK/tooling config and/or environment variables etc.
Optional if:
1) $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified OR
2) Explicit
`ServiceUrl`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL+`AccessKey`/$
EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID+`Secret
Key`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY specified.
See
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/userguide/cli-c
onfigure-envvars.html for details

options.name: --serviceurl
options.description:
specify a server endpoint for a Dynamo account. (Not
applicable if `ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SERVICE_URL
specified)

options.name: --accesskey
options.description:
specify an access key id for a Dynamo account. (Not
applicable if `ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION
specified; Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_ACCESS_KEY_ID
specified)

options.name: --secretkey
options.description:
specify a secret access key for a Dynamo account.
(Not applicable if
`ServiceRegion`/$EQUINOX_DYNAMO_REGION specified;
Optional if $EQUINOX_DYNAMO_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
specified)

options.name: --table
options.description:
specify a table name for the primary store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE, or
`IndexTable` specified)

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retriestimeouts
options.description:
specify max wait-time including retries in seconds
(default: 10)

options.name: --indextable
options.description:
specify a table name for the index store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_DYNAMO_TABLE_INDEX
specified. default: `Table`+`IndexSuffix`)

options.name: --indexsuffix
--streamsdop
options.description:
parallelism when loading events from Store Feed
Source. Default: Don't load events

options.name: --indexpartition
options.description:
Constrain Index Partitions to load. Default: Load all
indexed partitions

options.name: --indexpartitionid
options.description:
PartitionId to verify/import into. (optional,
omitting displays partitions->epochs list)

options.name: --minsizek
options.description: Index Stream minimum Item size in KiB. Default 48

options.name: --eventsperbatch
options.description:
Maximum Events to Ingest as a single batch. Default
10000

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --rus
options.description:
Specify RU/s level to provision for the Aux
Container. (with AutoScale, the value represents the
maximum RU/s to AutoScale based on).

options.name: --autoscale
options.description:
Autoscale provisioned throughput. Use --rus to
specify the maximum RU/s.

options.name: --mode
options.description:
Configure RU mode to use Container-level RU,
Database-level RU, or Serverless allocations
(Default: Use Container-level allocation).

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for a Cosmos account.
(optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified)

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for Cosmos store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE
specified)

options.name: --container
options.description:
specify a container name for Cosmos store. (optional
if environment variable EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONTAINER
specified)

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries (default: 1).

options.name: --retrieswaittime
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds (default: 5)

options.name: --leasecontainer
options.description:
Specify full Lease Container Name (default: Container
+ Suffix).

options.name: --suffix
options.description:
Specify Container Name suffix (default: `-aux`, if
LeaseContainer not specified).

options.name: --lagfreqm
options.description: Specify frequency to dump lag stats. Default: off

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --connectionstring
options.description:
Connection string for the postgres database housing
message-db. (Optional if environment variable
MDB_CONNECTION_STRING is defined)

options.name: --checkpointconnectionstring
options.description:
Connection string used for the checkpoint store. If
not specified, defaults to the connection string

options.name: --checkpointschema
options.description:
Schema that should contain the checkpoints table
Optional if environment variable MDB_SCHEMA is defined

options.name: --category
options.description:
The message-db category to load (must specify >1 when
projecting)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --consumergroupname
options.description:
Projector instance context name. Optional if source
is JSON

options.name: --maxreadahead
options.description:
maximum number of batches to let processing get ahead
of completion. Default: File: 32768 Other: 4.

options.name: --maxwriters
options.description:
maximum number of concurrent streams on which to
process at any time. Default: 8 (Cosmos: 16).

options.name: --fromtail
options.description:
(iff fresh projection) - force starting from present
Position. Default: Ensure each and every event is
projected from the start.

options.name: --follow
options.description: Stop when the Tail is reached.

options.name: --requireall
options.description:
Wait for out of order events to arrive (including
waiting for event 0 per stream) before dispatching
for any stream. NOTE normally a large `MaxReadAhead`
and `cosmos -b` is required to avoid starving the
scheduler. NOTE This mode does not make sense to
apply unless the ProcessorName is fresh; if the
consumer group name is not fresh (and hence items are
excluded from the feed), there will inevitably be
missing events, and processing will stall. Default:
assume events arrive from the changefeed (and/or the
input JSON file) without any gaps or out of order
deliveries for any stream.

options.name: --eventsonly
options.description:
Exclude Unfolds from processing. Default: Unfolds are
read, parsed and processed

options.name: --categorize
options.description: Gather handler latency stats by category

options.name: --maxitems
options.description:
Limits RU consumption when reading; impacts
checkpointing granularity by adjusting the batch size
being loaded from the feed. Default (Sync): 9999.
Default: 100 (CosmosClient default)

options.name: --exclude-system
options.description:
Exclude System streams. Default: Include Index
Streams, identified by a $ prefix.

options.name: --include-category
options.description:
Allow Stream Category. Multiple values are combined
with OR. Default: include all, subject to Category
Deny and Stream Deny rules.

options.name: --exclude-category
options.description:
Deny  Stream Category. Specified values/regexes are
applied after the Category Allow rule(s).

options.name: --include-streamname
options.description:
Allow Stream Name. Multiple values are combined with
OR. Default: Allow all streams that pass the category
Allow test, Fail the Category and Stream deny tests.

options.name: --exclude-streamname
options.description:
Deny  Stream Name. Specified values/regexes are
applied after the IncCat, ExcCat and IncStream
filters.

options.name: --include-eventtype
options.description:
Allow Event Type Name. Multiple values are combined
with OR. Applied only after Category and Stream
filters. Default: include all.

options.name: --exclude-eventtype
options.description:
Deny  Event Type Name. Specified values/regexes are
applied after the Event Type Name Allow rule(s).

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --connectionmode
options.description: override the connection mode. Default: Direct.

options.name: --connection
options.description:
specify a connection string for the destination
Cosmos account.
Default
(From Cosmos): Same as Source.
Default
(From Json): optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_CONNECTION specified

options.name: --database
options.description:
specify a database name for store.
Default
(From Cosmos): Same as Source.
Default
(From Json): optional if environment variable
EQUINOX_COSMOS_DATABASE specified

options.name: --container
options.description: specify a container name for store.

options.name: --leasecontainerid
options.description:
store leases in Sync target DB (default: use `-aux`
adjacent to the Source Container). Enables the Source
to be read via a ReadOnly connection string.

options.name: --retries
options.description: specify operation retries. Default: 2.

options.name: --retrieswaittime
options.description:
specify max wait-time for retry when being throttled
by Cosmos in seconds. Default: 5.

options.name: --maxkib
options.description:
specify maximum size in KiB to pass to the Sync
stored proc (reduce if Malformed Streams due to 413
RequestTooLarge responses). Default: 128.

options.description: display this list of options.
